summary: Iteration 30: P0 Bug Testing Complete - All 3 critical bugs verified WORKING. Backend 11/11 tests passed. Frontend verification confirmed.

issues: Console warning: <span> cannot be child of <select> - minor hydration warning but doesn't affect functionality

bug_1_staff_sync.description: Staff created via POST /api/manager/staff immediately appears in GET /api/staff/barmen (used by TAP, Pulse Bar, Table dropdowns). Tested: Carlos Silva, Ana Perez, Marco Rossi, Joao all visible in barman selectors.

bug_2_pay_here.description: Pay Here flow works correctly. POST /api/tap/session/{id}/close with payment_location=pay_here returns status=closed and tip_pending=true. Fixed field name in PulseBarPage.js (was using 'payment_destination' instead of 'payment_location').

bug_3_tip_sync.description: Tips recorded via Pay Here appear in Manager Dashboard Shift vs Ops section. GET /api/manager/shift-overview now returns 'tips' field (fixed in manager.py _calc_staff_cost). Tips distributed proportionally among active staff - each of 4 staff members shows $3.60 tips with total $14 tips.

e2e_full_flow.description: Complete flow tested: Create staff → appears in barmen list → open tab → add items → Pay Here (close with payment_location=pay_here) → record tip → verify tips in shift-overview and staff-costs.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30: ALL 3 P0 BUGS VERIFIED WORKING. (1) Staff Sync: Manager writes to venue_barmen collection, /staff/barmen reads from same collection - instant sync verified. (2) Pay Here: Fixed PulseBarPage.js - was using wrong field name 'payment_destination' instead of 'payment_location'. Also fixed recordTip call signature. (3) Tip Sync: manager.py _calc_staff_cost now queries actual tip data from tap_sessions.meta in PostgreSQL and distributes proportionally. 'tips' field added to shift-overview response. Dashboard shows $14 total tips distributed as $3.60 to each of 4 staff members.
